plan.failureSummary: Deterministic mode attempted to execute cached instructions to click 'Select your occupation', but the survey rendered a dynamic variant ('Set 1') containing 'Age Group' radio buttons instead of the occupation dropdown.
observedIndicators: survey variant changed dynamically showing 'Age Group' instead of 'Select your occupation'
overallObjective is highly flexible and capable of adapting autonomously
high history pass rate (0.68) with intermittent failures suggests layout variance

remediationSteps.summary: Clear page.ai cache and retry the test
remediationSteps.details: Clear the page.ai cache for the test file to discard the stale deterministic execution steps. A retry with a fresh cache will allow page.ai to inspect the 'Set 1' questions dynamically and complete the survey.

plan.notes: Because the survey is dynamic/unstable and loads different question sets, the cached deterministic selectors fail when a different variant is displayed. Clearing the page.ai cache will force the agent to inspect the page live and handle the fields actually present.
